[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Total gains or losses included in earnings -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Fair Value, Measurement with Unobservable Inputs Reconciliation, Recurring Basis, Asset, Gain (Loss) Included in Earnings -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Cash, Cash Equivalents, Restricted Cash, and Restricted Cash Equivalents, Period Increase (Decrease), Excluding Exchange Rate Effect -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/totalLabel) (en-US) Net increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Effect of foreign exchange rate changes on cash and cash equivalents -

[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Effect of Exchange Rate on Cash, Cash Equivalents, Restricted Cash, and Restricted Cash Equivalents, Including Disposal Group and Discontinued Operations -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Cash, Cash Equivalents, Restricted Cash, and Restricted Cash Equivalents -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/periodEndLabel) (en-US) Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/periodStartLabel) (en-US) Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Weighted Average Number of Shares Outstanding, Diluted -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/totalLabel) (en-US) Denominator for diluted weighted average share (in shares) -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Weighted average shares of common stock outstanding - diluted (in shares) -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Weighted average shares of common stock outstanding - basic (in shares) -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2009/role/netLabel) (en-US) Average weighted shares outstanding for the period (in shares) -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Weighted Average Number of Shares Outstanding, Basic -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/verboseLabel) (en-US) Denominator for basic weighted average share (in shares) -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Cash and Cash Equivalents, at Carrying Value -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Cash and Cash Equivalents, Policy [Policy Text Block] -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Interest Paid, Excluding Capitalized Interest, Operating Activities -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Percent of Total Investments at Fair Value -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Fair Value, Asset, Recurring Basis, Still Held, Unrealized Gain (Loss) -

[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Net change in unrealized (depreciation) appreciation for the period relating to those Level III assets that were still held by the Company at the end of the period: -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Long-Term Debt, Weighted Average Interest Rate, over Time -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Fair Value Measurement, Policy [Policy Text Block] -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Increase (decrease) in net assets resulting from operations -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Net Income (Loss), Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest [Abstract] -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2009/role/netLabel) (en-US) Shares outstanding at end of period (in shares) -

[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Common stock, par value $0.01 per share, 200,000,000 shares authorized and 107,851,415 and 102,558,859 shares issued and outstanding, respectively -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Schedule of Derivative Instruments in Statement of Financial Position, Fair Value [Table Text Block] -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Schedule of Derivative Instruments in Statement of Financial Position, Fair Value -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Net Income (Loss) Attributable to Parent, Diluted -
